author: DominicVainMod
content:
@All Pings @Game Pings 

Honeyland in SAGE Labs - Coming Friday to the Meta Crafting Station

Hey everyone, the long-awaited craftable Honeyland SFT in SAGE Labs is launching THIS FRIDAY and we want to give you a heads up on the recipe! Supplies are limited and it's first come, first serve, so make sure you have the necessary resources ready.  

Honeyland x SAGE Labs - Meta Crafting Station Recipe: DESCRIPTION: A badge representing a captain's merit in crafting the unique celebratory SFT for the Star Atlas and Honeyland partnership.

QUANTITY: 100

• Polymer required: 241,920
• Crystal Lattice required: 75,600
• Graphene required: 201,600
• Food required: 604,800
• SDUs required: 57,456
After all 100 items are minted, Honeyland will airdrop a Honeyland/Star Atlas NFT (Part of the Honeyland Legends Collection) and a Gen 1 Egg! (Note: Each wallet can only qualify one time for the Honeyland airdrop.)

 | Craft the recipe on  at https://based.staratlas.com/
